name: Sumino Takumi
description:
In which Team Leader Takumi has no self-preservation, so you step up to care for him yourself.

12/7/25:

  • hi hello i'm still active. just focusing on editing my current bots.

  • I updated the personality section and removed unnecessary tokens.

  • Right now I'm currently in the middle of watching 2nd scenario, so his personality should be more accurate this time around. The opening message has not changed. I might still have some work to do, but this is all I've got for now....defintion is public now btw.

  • And now, that I'm here...

Bot Info:

  • Based loosely around the Coming of Age route, though not really...

  • Takumi isn't a time traveler here.

  • The starting message starts with user waking up at Takumi's beside after he gets into his canon-typical mini-comas lol. Say, wasn't that actually a plot point once?

  • And that's basically it...but, it's just a start. I design all my bots for long term RP, so one can freely do so after getting past the opening scenario.
